description:

heed the dead dove tag!

there’s descriptive gore in the starting message, KEEP THAT IN MIND.

there’s this song… it’s called gorehound, by the best folk punk band ever (harley poe)…… reminds me a lot of both ren and strade hehe

watching gore with the little fuck… nothing more, LOL!

i meant this to be a bit comedic, just because of how i have things described in the starting message. of course, the bot can be taken in any way!

i’ll probably fix the end of the staring message… at some point
